texto: Surely your longings and feelings arise from the God who created you. They were created in order to be filled, not crushed. Surely we shall find peace not by eliminating desire, but by finding its fulfillment and satisfaction in the One who created it.
explicacao: Citação de Sundar Singh sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Surely your longings and feelings arise from the God who created you. They were created in order …” articula reflexao, paz, created em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
